selected_queue_state.selection_rule: No later continuity-owned canonical item exists; perform additive continuity recovery without overwriting stale canonical queue state.

completed_slice.memory: The project now requires audio claims to be labeled by evidence layer: activation, context state, render advance, browser route, physical output, and human report are distinct and non-substitutable.

canonical_queue_update_policy: Additive continuity-owned update only. Do not overwrite operations/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json until the committed queue-promotion mechanism incorporates successor items.
next_action: Promote a continuity successor item that integrates CM-0010 and CM-0011 into continuity-index.json and defines machine-checkable vocabulary constraints for cross-team evidence packets.
